text:
これがデ・マルモスの老成体のお肉……
本当にありがとう！

思ったよりもしっかりとした肉質ね。
まずは燻製にして保存食として
取り扱ってみようかしら……

塩漬けにして
さらに熟成させてみるのもいいかも！

今回も本当に助かったわ！
また次も

So this is what some well aged
De Marmoth meat is like, hmm?
Thank you so much!

It's a lot heftier than I would have imagined.
I think what I'll do first is smoke it so it'll
last longer...

I might even salt it and try and preserve it
that way!

Anywho! Thanks as always! I hope you're down
for another little collaboration sometime!
